text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One evening, T.M. Opera O and I are<n>walking
around the shopping district...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ah, Trainer! Look ahead. A crowd has<n>gathered...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Do you think it's a duel? If so, I must<n>intercede. Or
perhaps—should I enter<n>the fray?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We go and take a look. Just as I<n>thought, there's
no duel going on.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with<n>our New
Year's raffle! This year's<n>grand-prize is a hot
spring vacation<n>for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot<n>hamburger
steak! Second-prize<n>winners get a bushel of
carrots! And<n>third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
How about you? The prima donna<n>over there!
Care to try your luck?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! I suppose I have no<n>choice now that
I've been singled out<n>among the audience.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A raffle is it? How amusing. I'm<n>absolutely
fascinated with this<n>spinning gadget you have
here.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, pluck that ticket from your<n>breast pocket.
And obviously, only<n>use your index and middle
fingers.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's always a performance, even in<n>the way one
pulls something from a<n>pocket... I take out the
ticket as she<n>asks and give it to the clerk.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Time to start the show, Trainer. Take<n>hold of the
gadget's lever with me.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
For the moment of truth! Spin, O gears<n>of fate!
Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Both of us raise one hand to the sky<n>and turn the
raffle spinner with the<n>other.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the<n>spinner's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves<n>a
grand-prize winner! Come and get<n>the coupon for
your hot spring<n>vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Oooh! 'Tis a ray of light from the<n>heavens!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The grand-prize! Indeed, even the<n>Goddess of
Luck is enamored with<n>the star that I am.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha! Aaah ha ha haaa!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A hot spring vacation? How delightful.<n>I would
dare depart this instant, if only<n>I could.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But, alas, it's not in the cards while I<n>still walk the
Overlord's path.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes. As I traverse this path, I should<n>entertain no
other.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
If only the hot spring would come to<n>me! Should it
not rush to my feet the<n>moment I beckon?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Truly? They're surprisingly<n>unaccommodating.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Then nothing can be done. I'll entrust<n>you with the
ticket for now.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Close it with wax using the king's<n>seal and keep
it safe until the<n>appropriate time comes.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And now the hot spring vacation<n>ticket is in my
possession.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, hehehe... Can you see it?<n>Because I most
definitely can!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
At the summit of the Overlord's path...<n>is a hot
spring! Flowing freely from<n>the very earth! Haaah
ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With a hot spring vacation to look<n>forward to,
Opera O's motivation<n>shoots through the roof!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize<n>winner!
Congratulations! You get one<n>deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hah, first-prize! Luck certainly loves<n>me. Even I, a
king of kings, am<n>pleased by this!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But wait! Could it be?! The holy<n>sword before us
is none other than...<n>Excaliburger!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Behold! A single carrot stands<n>plunged into the
stone of minced<n>meat!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Only one worthy to rule is capable of<n>withdrawing
it.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Which means I have not a moment to<n>lose. We
must make haste to the<n>kitchen!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I am prepared! Are you ready,<n>Trainer?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Once I draw the carrot, you are to say<n>the words
of revelation. Understood?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ready... Pop!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Behold my glory! Haaah ha ha!Munch, munch...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
This holy sword... is delicious! Truly a<n>treat for the
royal taste buds!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Opera O devours Excaliburger, content<n>with both
the flavor and how much<n>fun it is to eat.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's<n>your lucky
day! You're going home<n>with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hmn, second-prize. I typically fare<n>better than this.
And yet...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Look at them all! With a little love from<n>me, they
would make great<n>appreciation gifts for my
adorning<n>fans.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, perfect! Young boy over there, I<n>bestow unto
thee a carrot.

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text: Eww... Keep it. I hate carrots.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! Whatever do you<n>mean? This is no
ordinary carrot, but<n>a loving gift from yours truly.

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text: Now I really don't want it...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Y-young boy! Wait!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
How could this be? Ah! I see now.<n>One taste of
this carrot and all other<n>foods would be rendered
unpalatable.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ahh! I cannot hold out any longer!<n>Trainer, we
must eat all the carrots<n>ourselves.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A ballet of carrots, je t'aime! We<n>shall all dance
the dance of carrots<n>together!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We eat the carrots while performing<n>some weird
choreography. The taste<n>is nothing to write home
about, but<n>they're good all the same.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won<n>the
third-prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What? A single carrot?! How dare<n>you insult
royalty!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: What do you have to say for yourself,<n>carrot?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She vents her anger to the carrot. Of<n>course, it has
no response.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I have no other choice than to sing a<n>ballad of
sorrow, repurposing the<n>carrot as a microphone.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It's times like this that make you sulk<n>in your
sorrows, don a different<n>mantel, and sing the
blues. Hit it,<n>band!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ahhh, yes! Uh-huh! Mhmmm!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Welcooome to the carrot kingdooom!<n>You carotene
soldier, un deux trois!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Opera O sings with desperation, but<n>the kids
around the shops seem to<n>like her song.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you<n>pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of<n>tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, woe... Worse has come to worst.<n>The great
me... recipient of a<n>consolation prize?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
To think I would receive nothing more<n>than a mere
packet of tissue paper...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Notice how I say "tissue paper"and not simply "tissue." The formerhas a more beautiful ring to it.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I issue a royal decree!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Take this packet of tissue paper and<n>exchange it
for a hot spring vacation<n>ticket!
choice_data_list: There's no way they'd go for that...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I will not hear your whining. Tragedy<n>has befallen
me, and I have become<n>the mad king, the Raving
Lord!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
If you fail, I will confine you to<n>imprisonment in la
Conciergerie!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A bad luck of the draw has changed<n>the king. It
doesn't seem like<n>anything is going to improve
her<n>mood.
